interpretation: Advisories were the most common beach activity category.
Closure activity was common across the study period.
Sewage-related activity was close to the closure total.
Tijuana River-related activity was a major part of the pattern.

result: Closure active record-days on rainy days
interpretation: Closures were higher on rainy days than dry days.

result: Sewage-related active record-days on rainy days
interpretation: Sewage-related activity was higher on rainy days than dry days.

result: Tijuana River-related active record-days on rainy days
interpretation: Tijuana River-related activity was higher on rainy days than dry days.

result: Closure active record-days during 7-day high-flow window
interpretation: The widest high-flow window showed the largest closure increase.

value: 7-day rainfall total with Active closure record-days: rho = 0.306
interpretation: Recent rainfall had the clearest association with closure activity.
